subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The hearts have overflowed with sorrows, and tears have streamed forth in anguish from deprivation when hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد طفحت القلوب بالاحزان و سالت الدموع اسفا من الحرمان لما سمعت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the departed, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
